initial_candidates.sql:
WITH sales_by_week AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    SUM(ext_sales_price) AS day_sales
  FROM (
    SELECT ws_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk, ws_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price FROM web_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT cs_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk, cs_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price FROM catalog_sales
  ) sales
  JOIN date_dim ON sales.sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name
),
pivot_sales AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Sunday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sun_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Monday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS mon_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Tuesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS tue_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Wednesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS wed_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Thursday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS thu_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Friday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS fri_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Saturday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sat_sales
  FROM sales_by_week
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year
),
year_2001 AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq AS d_week_seq1,
    sun_sales AS sun_sales1,
    mon_sales AS mon_sales1,
    tue_sales AS tue_sales1,
    wed_sales AS wed_sales1,
    thu_sales AS thu_sales1,
    fri_sales AS fri_sales1,
    sat_sales AS sat_sales1
  FROM pivot_sales
  WHERE d_year = 2001
),
year_2002 AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq AS d_week_seq2,
    sun_sales AS sun_sales2,
    mon_sales AS mon_sales2,
    tue_sales AS tue_sales2,
    wed_sales AS wed_sales2,
    thu_sales AS thu_sales2,
    fri_sales AS fri_sales2,
    sat_sales AS sat_sales2
  FROM pivot_sales
  WHERE d_year = 2002
)
SELECT
  y1.d_week_seq1 AS d_week_seq,
  ROUND(y1.sun_sales1 / NULLIF(y2.sun_sales2, 0), 2) AS sun_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(y1.mon_sales1 / NULLIF(y2.mon_sales2, 0), 2) AS mon_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(y1.tue_sales1 / NULLIF(y2.tue_sales2, 0), 2) AS tue_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(y1.wed_sales1 / NULLIF(y2.wed_sales2, 0), 2) AS wed_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(y1.thu_sales1 / NULLIF(y2.thu_sales2, 0), 2) AS thu_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(y1.fri_sales1 / NULLIF(y2.fri_sales2, 0), 2) AS fri_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(y1.sat_sales1 / NULLIF(y2.sat_sales2, 0), 2) AS sat_sales_ratio
FROM year_2001 y1
JOIN year_2002 y2 ON y1.d_week_seq1 = y2.d_week_seq2 - 53
ORDER BY d_week_seq ASC;

WITH sales_by_day AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    SUM(ext_sales_price) AS day_sales
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ws_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk,
      ws_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price,
      'web' AS source
    FROM web_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      cs_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk,
      cs_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price,
      'catalog' AS source
    FROM catalog_sales
  ) AS combined_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON combined_sales.sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name
),
pivoted AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Sunday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sun_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Monday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS mon_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Tuesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS tue_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Wednesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS wed_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Thursday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS thu_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Friday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS fri_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Saturday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sat_sales
  FROM sales_by_day
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year
),
sales_2001 AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq AS d_week_seq1,
    sun_sales, mon_sales, tue_sales, wed_sales, thu_sales, fri_sales, sat_sales
  FROM pivoted
  WHERE d_year = 2001
),
sales_2002 AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq AS d_week_seq2,
    sun_sales, mon_sales, tue_sales, wed_sales, thu_sales, fri_sales, sat_sales
  FROM pivoted
  WHERE d_year = 2002
),
aligned AS (
  SELECT
    s2001.d_week_seq1 AS d_week_seq,
    s2001.sun_sales AS sun_sales_2001,
    s2001.mon_sales AS mon_sales_2001,
    s2001.tue_sales AS tue_sales_2001,
    s2001.wed_sales AS wed_sales_2001,
    s2001.thu_sales AS thu_sales_2001,
    s2001.fri_sales AS fri_sales_2001,
    s2001.sat_sales AS sat_sales_2001,
    s2002.sun_sales AS sun_sales_2002,
    s2002.mon_sales AS mon_sales_2002,
    s2002.tue_sales AS tue_sales_2002,
    s2002.wed_sales AS wed_sales_2002,
    s2002.thu_sales AS thu_sales_2002,
    s2002.fri_sales AS fri_sales_2002,
    s2002.sat_sales AS sat_sales_2002
  FROM sales_2001 s2001
  JOIN sales_2002 s2002
    ON s2001.d_week_seq1 = s2002.d_week_seq2 - 53
)
SELECT
  d_week_seq,
  ROUND(CAST(sun_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(sun_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS sun_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(mon_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(mon_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS mon_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(tue_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(tue_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS tue_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(wed_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(wed_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS wed_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(thu_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(thu_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS thu_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(fri_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(fri_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS fri_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(sat_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(sat_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS sat_ratio
FROM aligned
ORDER BY d_week_seq;

WITH sales_by_week AS (
  SELECT 
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    SUM(ext_sales_price) AS day_sales
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      ws_sold_date_sk AS date_sk,
      ws_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price,
      'web' AS source
    FROM web_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
      cs_sold_date_sk AS date_sk,
      cs_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price,
      'catalog' AS source
    FROM catalog_sales
  ) AS combined_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON combined_sales.date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name
),
pivoted_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Sunday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sun_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Monday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS mon_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Tuesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS tue_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Wednesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS wed_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Thursday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS thu_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Friday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS fri_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Saturday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sat_sales
  FROM sales_by_week
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year
),
sales_2001 AS (
  SELECT 
    d_week_seq AS d_week_seq1,
    sun_sales, mon_sales, tue_sales, wed_sales, thu_sales, fri_sales, sat_sales
  FROM pivoted_sales
  WHERE d_year = 2001
),
sales_2002 AS (
  SELECT 
    d_week_seq AS d_week_seq2,
    sun_sales, mon_sales, tue_sales, wed_sales, thu_sales, fri_sales, sat_sales
  FROM pivoted_sales
  WHERE d_year = 2002
)
SELECT 
  s1.d_week_seq1 AS d_week_seq,
  ROUND(s1.sun_sales / s2.sun_sales, 2) AS sun_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.mon_sales / s2.mon_sales, 2) AS mon_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.tue_sales / s2.tue_sales, 2) AS tue_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.wed_sales / s2.wed_sales, 2) AS wed_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.thu_sales / s2.thu_sales, 2) AS thu_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.fri_sales / s2.fri_sales, 2) AS fri_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.sat_sales / s2.sat_sales, 2) AS sat_sales_ratio
FROM sales_2001 s1
JOIN sales_2002 s2 ON s1.d_week_seq1 = s2.d_week_seq2 - 53
ORDER BY d_week_seq ASC;

WITH sales_by_week AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    SUM(ext_sales_price) AS day_sales
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ws_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk,
      ws_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price
    FROM web_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      cs_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk,
      cs_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price
    FROM catalog_sales
  ) AS all_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON all_sales.sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name
),
pivot_sales AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Sunday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sun_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Monday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS mon_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Tuesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS tue_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Wednesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS wed_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Thursday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS thu_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Friday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS fri_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Saturday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sat_sales
  FROM sales_by_week
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year
),
sales_2001 AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    sun_sales,
    mon_sales,
    tue_sales,
    wed_sales,
    thu_sales,
    fri_sales,
    sat_sales
  FROM pivot_sales
  WHERE d_year = 2001
),
sales_2002 AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq - 53 AS d_week_seq,
    sun_sales AS sun_sales_2002,
    mon_sales AS mon_sales_2002,
    tue_sales AS tue_sales_2002,
    wed_sales AS wed_sales_2002,
    thu_sales AS thu_sales_2002,
    fri_sales AS fri_sales_2002,
    sat_sales AS sat_sales_2002
  FROM pivot_sales
  WHERE d_year = 2002
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(s1.d_week_seq, s2.d_week_seq) AS d_week_seq,
  ROUND(s1.sun_sales / s2.sun_sales_2002, 2) AS sun_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.mon_sales / s2.mon_sales_2002, 2) AS mon_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.tue_sales / s2.tue_sales_2002, 2) AS tue_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.wed_sales / s2.wed_sales_2002, 2) AS wed_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.thu_sales / s2.thu_sales_2002, 2) AS thu_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.fri_sales / s2.fri_sales_2002, 2) AS fri_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s1.sat_sales / s2.sat_sales_2002, 2) AS sat_sales_ratio
FROM sales_2001 s1
FULL OUTER JOIN sales_2002 s2 ON s1.d_week_seq = s2.d_week_seq
ORDER BY d_week_seq ASC;

WITH sales_by_week AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS sun_sales,
    0 AS mon_sales,
    0 AS tue_sales,
    0 AS wed_sales,
    0 AS thu_sales,
    0 AS fri_sales,
    0 AS sat_sales
  FROM web_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    AND d_day_name = 'Sunday'
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    d_week_seq,

    d_day_name,

    d_week_seq,

  JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    AND d_day_name = 'Thursday'
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    0 AS sun_sales,
    0 AS mon_sales,
    0 AS tue_sales,
    0 AS wed_sales,
    0 AS thu_sales,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS fri_sales,
    0 AS sat_sales
  FROM web_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    AND d_day_name = 'Friday'
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,

    AND d_day_name = 'Saturday'

  SELECT

  SELECT
    d_week_seq,

    AND d_day_name = 'Monday'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    0 AS sun_sales,
    0 AS mon_sales,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS tue_sales,
    0 AS wed_sales,
    0 AS thu_sales,
    0 AS fri_sales,
    0 AS sat_sales
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    AND d_day_name = 'Tuesday'
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    0 AS sun_sales,
    0 AS mon_sales,
    0 AS tue_sales,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS wed_sales,
    0 AS thu_sales,
    0 AS fri_sales,
    0 AS sat_sales
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    AND d_day_name = 'Wednesday'
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    0 AS sun_sales,
    0 AS mon_sales,
    0 AS tue_sales,
    0 AS wed_sales,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS thu_sales,
    0 AS fri_sales,
    0 AS sat_sales
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    AND d_day_name = 'Thursday'
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    0 AS sun_sales,
    0 AS mon_sales,
    0 AS tue_sales,
    0 AS wed_sales,
    0 AS thu_sales,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS fri_sales,
    0 AS sat_sales
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    AND d_day_name = 'Friday'
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    0 AS sun_sales,
    0 AS mon_sales,
    0 AS tue_sales,
    0 AS wed_sales,
    0 AS thu_sales,
    0 AS fri_sales,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS sat_sales
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    AND d_day_name = 'Saturday'
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name
),
aggregated_sales AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    SUM(sun_sales) AS sun_sales,
    SUM(mon_sales) AS mon_sales,
    SUM(tue_sales) AS tue_sales,
    SUM(wed_sales) AS wed_sales,
    SUM(thu_sales) AS thu_sales,
    SUM(fri_sales) AS fri_sales,
    SUM(sat_sales) AS sat_sales
  FROM sales_by_week
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year
),
sales_2001 AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    sun_sales,
    mon_sales,
    tue_sales,
    wed_sales,
    thu_sales,
    fri_sales,
    sat_sales
  FROM aggregated_sales
  WHERE d_year = 2001
),
sales_2002 AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq - 53 AS d_week_seq,
    sun_sales,
    mon_sales,
    tue_sales,
    wed_sales,
    thu_sales,
    fri_sales,
    sat_sales
  FROM aggregated_sales
  WHERE d_year = 2002
)
SELECT
  s2001.d_week_seq,
  ROUND(s2001.sun_sales / NULLIF(s2002.sun_sales, 0), 2) AS sun_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s2001.mon_sales / NULLIF(s2002.mon_sales, 0), 2) AS mon_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s2001.tue_sales / NULLIF(s2002.tue_sales, 0), 2) AS tue_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s2001.wed_sales / NULLIF(s2002.wed_sales, 0), 2) AS wed_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s2001.thu_sales / NULLIF(s2002.thu_sales, 0), 2) AS thu_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s2001.fri_sales / NULLIF(s2002.fri_sales, 0), 2) AS fri_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(s2001.sat_sales / NULLIF(s2002.sat_sales, 0), 2) AS sat_sales_ratio
FROM sales_2001 s2001
JOIN sales_2002 s2002 ON s2001.d_week_seq = s2002.d_week_seq
ORDER BY s2001.d_week_seq ASC

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH sales_by_day AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    SUM(ext_sales_price) AS day_sales
  FROM (
    SELECT
      ws_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk,
      ws_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price,
      'web' AS source
    FROM web_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      cs_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk,
      cs_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price,
      'catalog' AS source
    FROM catalog_sales
  ) AS combined_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON combined_sales.sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name
),
pivoted AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Sunday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sun_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Monday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS mon_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Tuesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS tue_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Wednesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS wed_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Thursday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS thu_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Friday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS fri_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Saturday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sat_sales
  FROM sales_by_day
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year
),
sales_2001 AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq AS d_week_seq1,
    sun_sales, mon_sales, tue_sales, wed_sales, thu_sales, fri_sales, sat_sales
  FROM pivoted
  WHERE d_year = 2001
),
sales_2002 AS (
  SELECT
    d_week_seq AS d_week_seq2,
    sun_sales, mon_sales, tue_sales, wed_sales, thu_sales, fri_sales, sat_sales
  FROM pivoted
  WHERE d_year = 2002
),
aligned AS (
  SELECT
    s2001.d_week_seq1 AS d_week_seq,
    s2001.sun_sales AS sun_sales_2001,
    s2001.mon_sales AS mon_sales_2001,
    s2001.tue_sales AS tue_sales_2001,
    s2001.wed_sales AS wed_sales_2001,
    s2001.thu_sales AS thu_sales_2001,
    s2001.fri_sales AS fri_sales_2001,
    s2001.sat_sales AS sat_sales_2001,
    s2002.sun_sales AS sun_sales_2002,
    s2002.mon_sales AS mon_sales_2002,
    s2002.tue_sales AS tue_sales_2002,
    s2002.wed_sales AS wed_sales_2002,
    s2002.thu_sales AS thu_sales_2002,
    s2002.fri_sales AS fri_sales_2002,
    s2002.sat_sales AS sat_sales_2002
  FROM sales_2001 s2001
  JOIN sales_2002 s2002
    ON s2001.d_week_seq1 = s2002.d_week_seq2 - 53
)
SELECT
  d_week_seq,
  ROUND(CAST(sun_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(sun_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS sun_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(mon_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(mon_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS mon_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(tue_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(tue_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS tue_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(wed_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(wed_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS wed_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(thu_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(thu_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS thu_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(fri_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(fri_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS fri_ratio,
  ROUND(CAST(sat_sales_2001 AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(sat_sales_2002, 0), 2) AS sat_ratio
FROM aligned
ORDER BY d_week_seq;

candidates.sql:
WITH sales_by_week AS (
  SELECT 
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    d_day_name,
    SUM(ext_sales_price) AS day_sales
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      ws_sold_date_sk AS date_sk,
      ws_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price,
      'web' AS source
    FROM web_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
      cs_sold_date_sk AS date_sk,
      cs_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price,
      'catalog' AS source
    FROM catalog_sales
  ) AS combined_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON combined_sales.date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year, d_day_name
),
pivoted_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    d_week_seq,
    d_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Sunday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sun_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Monday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS mon_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Tuesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS tue_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Wednesday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS wed_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Thursday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS thu_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Friday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS fri_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_day_name = 'Saturday' THEN day_sales ELSE 0 END) AS sat_sales
  FROM sales_by_week
  GROUP BY d_week_seq, d_year
),
aligned_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    s2001.d_week_seq AS d_week_seq,
    s2001.sun_sales AS sun_sales_2001,
    s2001.mon_sales AS mon_sales_2001,
    s2001.tue_sales AS tue_sales_2001,
    s2001.wed_sales AS wed_sales_2001,
    s2001.thu_sales AS thu_sales_2001,
    s2001.fri_sales AS fri_sales_2001,
    s2001.sat_sales AS sat_sales_2001,
    s2002.sun_sales AS sun_sales_2002,
    s2002.mon_sales AS mon_sales_2002,
    s2002.tue_sales AS tue_sales_2002,
    s2002.wed_sales AS wed_sales_2002,
    s2002.thu_sales AS thu_sales_2002,
    s2002.fri_sales AS fri_sales_2002,
    s2002.sat_sales AS sat_sales_2002
  FROM pivoted_sales s2001
  JOIN pivoted_sales s2002 
    ON s2001.d_week_seq = s2002.d_week_seq - 53
  WHERE s2001.d_year = 2001 AND s2002.d_year = 2002
)
SELECT 
  d_week_seq,
  ROUND(sun_sales_2001 / sun_sales_2002, 2) AS sun_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(mon_sales_2001 / mon_sales_2002, 2) AS mon_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(tue_sales_2001 / tue_sales_2002, 2) AS tue_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(wed_sales_2001 / wed_sales_2002, 2) AS wed_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(thu_sales_2001 / thu_sales_2002, 2) AS thu_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(fri_sales_2001 / fri_sales_2002, 2) AS fri_sales_ratio,
  ROUND(sat_sales_2001 / sat_sales_2002, 2) AS sat_sales_ratio
FROM aligned_sales
ORDER BY d_week_seq ASC;
